title: Hotfix: Propagate Custom Headers to Edge Nodes
body: The Custom Headers feature (v1.26.0) updates the Control Plane memory but fails to propagate those headers to Regional Edge nodes, meaning they don't apply to active tunnels on the edge.

sub_issues.title: Hotfix: ControlMessage Schema and WS Sender
Hotfix: Edge Node WS Receiver
sub_issues.body: Implement edge-side WS listener to handle `lease_headers` and call `s.registry.UpdateLeaseHeaders`.

sub_issues.title: Hotfix: Trigger WS Broadcast from API
sub_issues.body: Update `handleUpdateReservationHeaders` in `api.go` to invoke `sendEdgeWSHeaders` when the lease is held on an Edge Node.
